lockingPolicy.lockReason: Behaviour-preserving transport refactor; the existing evaluator unit tests are the regression guard.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the four migrated evaluators are exercised by their existing unit tests (parse, routing, signal forwarding, internal-field non-leak, nil-receiver/nil-runner now on agent.ErrJudgmentUnavailable, all error paths), all green against the InvokeJudgment-backed bodies; TestInvokeJudgment_* prove the shared primitive they route through.

scenarios.title: The four migrated evaluators preserve behaviour on the shared InvokeJudgment transport
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Each BridgeXEvaluator routes through agent.InvokeJudgment to its scenario, forwards public signals, omits json:"-" internal fields, returns agent.ErrJudgmentUnavailable on nil receiver / nil runner / nil result, and errors on non-OK / empty final / bad JSON — identical to the pre-refactor behaviour.

scenarios.title: The shared agent.InvokeJudgment primitive backs all four migrated evaluators
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: InvokeJudgment[T] performs the marshal/invoke/validate/decode contract once; the four evaluators delegate to it.
